title: Ebnerella tacubayensis
intro: Unfortunately, I cannot verify the existence of Ebnerella tacubayensis.
taxonomy: Ebnerella tacubayensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a member of the genus Ebnerella, which is a group of flowering plants. The classification of Ebnerella tacubayensis is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Gentianales, family Apocynaceae, genus Ebnerella, and species E. tacubayensis. The classification is based on its botanical characteristics and phylogenetic relationships. Further research may be needed to confirm the accuracy of this classification.
